process_generation_templates.overview: This file provides reusable templates and examples for generating business process documentation with Mermaid diagrams. These templates serve as starting points for common process patterns found in business blueprints.

template.name: end_to_end_process
template.description: Complete business process with multiple actors and decision points
template.use_case: New Business Application, Claims Processing, Policy Administration
template.markdown_template:
# [Process Name]
## Process Overview
**Process ID:** `[process-id]` **Business Context:** [Context Name] **Process Type:** End-to-End Business Process **Estimated Duration:** [duration] **Complexity:** [Low/Medium/High]
### Purpose [Brief description of what this process accomplishes and its business value]
### Scope - **Starts with:** [Triggering event] - **Ends with:** [Completion event] - **Includes:** [Key activities] - **Excludes:** [Out of scope items]
---
## Process Diagram
```mermaid flowchart TD Start([Start: Process Trigger])
subgraph Actor1[Actor/Role 1] A1[Activity 1] A2[Activity 2] end
subgraph System[System/Automation] S1[Validate Data] S2{Decision Point} S3[Process Data] end
subgraph Actor2[Actor/Role 2] B1[Review Activity] B2{Approval Decision} B3[Complete Activity] end
Start --> A1 A1 --> A2 A2 --> S1 S1 --> S2 S2 -->|Path A| S3 S2 -->|Path B| B1 S3 --> B1 B1 --> B2 B2 -->|Approved| B3 B2 -->|Rejected| A1 B3 --> End([End: Process Complete])
style Start fill:#90EE90 style End fill:#FFB6C1 style S2 fill:#FFD700 style B2 fill:#FFD700 ```
---
## Process Steps
### 1. [Step Name] - **Actor:** [Role/System] - **Activity Type:** [User Task/Service Task/Manual Task] - **Description:** [What happens in this step] - **Input Data:** - [`BusinessObject1`](../../business-objects/generated/[context]/BusinessObject1.json) - [`BusinessObject2`](../../business-objects/generated/[context]/BusinessObject2.json) - **Output Data:** - [`BusinessObject3`](../../business-objects/generated/[context]/BusinessObject3.json) - **Business Rules:** - [Rule 1] - [Rule 2]
### 2. [Decision Point Name] - **Actor:** [Role/System] - **Decision Type:** [Exclusive/Parallel/Inclusive Gateway] - **Description:** [What decision is being made] - **Conditions:** - **Path A:** [Condition description] - **Path B:** [Condition description] - **Business Logic:** ``` IF [condition] THEN [path] ELSE IF [condition] THEN [path] ELSE [default path] ```
---
## Business Objects
This process uses the following business objects:
| Business Object | Usage | Activity | |----------------|-------|----------| | [`ObjectName1`](../../business-objects/generated/[context]/ObjectName1.json) | Input | Activity 1, Activity 2 | | [`ObjectName2`](../../business-objects/generated/[context]/ObjectName2.json) | Output | Activity 3 | | [`ObjectName3`](../../business-objects/generated/[context]/ObjectName3.json) | Input/Output | Activity 4 |
---
## Business Rules
### Validation Rules 1. **Rule Name:** [Description] - **Applies to:** [Activity/Step] - **Condition:** [When this rule applies] - **Action:** [What happens]
### Decision Rules 1. **Rule Name:** [Description] - **Applies to:** [Decision point] - **Logic:** [Decision criteria]
---
## Integration Points
| Integration | Type | Activity | Description | |------------|------|----------|-------------| | [System Name] | [API/Service/Database] | [Activity] | [Purpose] |
---
## Exception Handling
### Error Scenarios 1. **Scenario:** [Error description] - **Trigger:** [What causes this error] - **Handling:** [How it's resolved] - **Recovery:** [Return point in process]
---
## Process Metadata
```json { "processId": "[process-id]", "processName": "[Process Name]", "version": "1.0.0", "context": "[Context Name]", "processType": "end-to-end", "actors": [ { "id": "actor1", "name": "[Actor Name]", "type": "human|system" } ], "activities": [ { "id": "activity1", "name": "[Activity Name]", "type": "userTask|serviceTask|manualTask|scriptTask", "actor": "actor1", "inputData": ["BusinessObject1"], "outputData": ["BusinessObject2"] } ], "gateways": [ { "id": "gateway1", "name": "[Gateway Name]", "type": "exclusive|parallel|inclusive", "conditions": [ { "path": "pathA", "condition": "[Condition expression]" } ] } ], "dataObjects": [ { "id": "BusinessObject1", "name": "Business Object 1", "path": "business-objects/generated/[context]/BusinessObject1.json" } ], "estimatedDuration": "[duration]", "complexity": "low|medium|high", "generatedFrom": "business-blueprints/[source].pdf", "generatedDate": "2026-05-06T10:00:00Z" } ```
---
**Generated by:** BAW Blueprint Parser Mode **Source Document:** [Document reference] **Last Updated:** [Date]

template.name: subprocess
template.description: Reusable subprocess that can be called from parent processes
template.use_case: Medical Underwriting, Document Verification, Risk Assessment
template.markdown_template:
# [Subprocess Name]
## Subprocess Overview
**Subprocess ID:** `[subprocess-id]` **Business Context:** [Context Name] **Process Type:** Reusable Subprocess **Called By:** [Parent process names]
### Purpose [What this subprocess accomplishes]
---
## Subprocess Diagram
```mermaid flowchart TD Start([Subprocess Start]) A[Activity 1] B[Activity 2] C{Decision} D[Activity 3] E[Activity 4] End([Subprocess End])
Start --> A A --> B B --> C C -->|Yes| D C -->|No| E D --> End E --> End
style Start fill:#90EE90 style End fill:#FFB6C1 ```
---
## Input Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description | |-----------|------|----------|-------------| | [paramName] | [`BusinessObject`](../../business-objects/generated/[context]/BusinessObject.json) | Yes/No | [Description] |
## Output Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Description | |-----------|------|-------------| | [paramName] | [`BusinessObject`](../../business-objects/generated/[context]/BusinessObject.json) | [Description] |
---
## Subprocess Steps
[Detailed step descriptions]
---
## Process Metadata
```json { "processId": "[subprocess-id]", "processName": "[Subprocess Name]", "processType": "subprocess", "isReusable": true, "inputParameters": [], "outputParameters": [], "activities": [] } ```

template.name: decision_process
template.description: Process focused on decision-making with complex branching logic
template.use_case: Risk Assessment, Claim Adjudication, Approval Workflows
template.markdown_template:
# [Decision Process Name] ## Process Overview **Process ID:** `[process-id]` **Process Type:** Decision Process **Decision Complexity:** [Low/Medium/High] --- ## Decision Flow Diagram ```mermaid flowchart TD Start([Start: Decision Required]) Input[Gather Input Data] Eval1{Evaluation
Criteria 1} Eval2{Evaluation
Criteria 2} Eval3{Evaluation
Criteria 3} Result1[Outcome A] Result2[Outcome B] Result3[Outcome C] Result4[Outcome D] End([End: Decision Made]) Start --> Input Input --> Eval1 Eval1 -->|Condition A| Result1 Eval1 -->|Condition B| Eval2 Eval2 -->|Condition C| Result2 Eval2 -->|Condition D| Eval3 Eval3 -->|Condition E| Result3 Eval3 -->|Condition F| Result4 Result1 --> End Result2 --> End Result3 --> End Result4 --> End style Start fill:#90EE90 style End fill:#FFB6C1 style Eval1 fill:#FFD700 style Eval2 fill:#FFD700 style Eval3 fill:#FFD700 ``` --- ## Decision Criteria ### Criterion 1: [Name] - **Input Data:** [`BusinessObject`](../../business-objects/generated/[context]/BusinessObject.json) - **Evaluation Logic:** ``` IF [condition] THEN [outcome] ``` - **Possible Outcomes:** [List outcomes] --- ## Decision Matrix | Criteria 1 | Criteria 2 | Criteria 3 | Result | |-----------|-----------|-----------|--------| | [Value] | [Value] | [Value] | [Outcome] | --- ## Process Metadata ```json { "processId": "[process-id]", "processType": "decision", "decisionCriteria": [], "possibleOutcomes": [] } ```

template.name: interaction_process
template.use_case: Customer Onboarding, Agent Communication, Multi-party Approval
template.markdown_template:
# [Interaction Process Name]
## Process Overview
**Process ID:** `[process-id]` **Process Type:** Interaction Process **Participants:** [List of actors]
---
## Interaction Diagram
```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant Actor1 participant System participant Actor2 participant Actor3
Actor1->>System: Action 1 System->>System: Process Data System->>Actor2: Request Action Actor2->>System: Provide Response System->>Actor3: Notify Actor3->>System: Acknowledge System->>Actor1: Complete
Note over Actor1,Actor3: [Important note about interaction] ```
---
## Interaction Steps
### 1. [Interaction Name] - **From:** [Actor/System] - **To:** [Actor/System] - **Message:** [Description] - **Data:** [`BusinessObject`](../../business-objects/generated/[context]/BusinessObject.json) - **Expected Response:** [Description]
---
## Process Metadata
```json { "processId": "[process-id]", "processType": "interaction", "participants": [], "interactions": [] } ```

example_process.name: new_business_application
example_process.description: Complete example of a New Business Application process
example_process.full_example:
# New Business Application Process ## Process Overview **Process ID:** `new-business-application` **Business Context:** LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities **Process Type:** End-to-End Business Process **Estimated Duration:** 2-4 weeks **Complexity:** High ### Purpose This process manages the complete lifecycle of a new insurance or annuity application from initial submission through policy issuance or decline. ### Scope - **Starts with:** Agent submits application - **Ends with:** Policy issued or application declined - **Includes:** Application validation, medical underwriting, risk assessment, policy issuance - **Excludes:** Post-issuance policy administration, claims processing --- ## Process Diagram ```mermaid flowchart TD Start([Start: Application Received]) subgraph Agent[Insurance Agent] A1[Collect Application Data] A2[Submit Application] end subgraph System[Automated System] S1[Validate Application] S2{Application
Complete?} S3[Route to Underwriter] S4[Generate Policy] end subgraph Underwriter[Underwriter] U1[Review Application] U2[Order Requirements] U3[Assess Risk] U4{Underwriting
Decision} end subgraph Medical[Medical Services] M1[Schedule Exam] M2[Conduct Exam] M3[Submit Results] end Start --> A1 A1 --> A2 A2 --> S1 S1 --> S2 S2 -->|Incomplete| A1 S2 -->|Complete| S3 S3 --> U1 U1 --> U2 U2 --> M1 M1 --> M2 M2 --> M3 M3 --> U3 U3 --> U4 U4 -->|Approved| S4 U4 -->|Declined| Decline[Send Decline Letter] U4 -->|Postponed| Postpone[Request Additional Info] S4 --> Issue[Issue Policy] Issue --> End([End: Process Complete]) Decline --> End Postpone --> U1 style Start fill:#90EE90 style End fill:#FFB6C1 style S2 fill:#FFD700 style U4 fill:#FFD700 ``` --- ## Process Steps ### 1. Collect Application Data - **Actor:** Insurance Agent - **Activity Type:** User Task - **Description:** Agent collects applicant information and policy requirements - **Input Data:** - Customer information (manual entry) - **Output Data:** - [`Application`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Application.json) - [`Policyholder`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Policyholder.json) - [`Insured`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Insured.json) - **Business Rules:** - Applicant must be at least 18 years old - All required fields must be completed ### 2. Validate Application - **Actor:** System - **Activity Type:** Service Task - **Description:** Automated validation of application data completeness and format - **Input Data:** - [`Application`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Application.json) - **Output Data:** - Validation results - **Business Rules:** - All required fields present - Data format validation (SSN, dates, etc.) - Age within product limits ### 3. Application Completeness Decision - **Actor:** System - **Decision Type:** Exclusive Gateway - **Description:** Determines if application is complete enough to proceed - **Conditions:** - **Complete:** All validations passed - **Incomplete:** Missing required information - **Business Logic:** ``` IF all_required_fields_present AND all_validations_passed THEN route_to_underwriter ELSE return_to_agent ``` ### 4. Medical Underwriting - **Actor:** Underwriter, Medical Services - **Activity Type:** Subprocess - **Description:** Comprehensive medical evaluation and risk assessment - **Input Data:** - [`Application`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Application.json) - [`Insured`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Insured.json) - [`MedicalHistory`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/MedicalHistory.json) - **Output Data:** - [`UnderwritingDecision`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/UnderwritingDecision.json) - [`MedicalRating`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/MedicalRating.json) ### 5. Underwriting Decision - **Actor:** Underwriter - **Decision Type:** Exclusive Gateway - **Description:** Final underwriting decision on application - **Conditions:** - **Approved:** Risk acceptable, issue policy - **Declined:** Risk too high, decline application - **Postponed:** Need additional information - **Business Logic:** ``` IF risk_class IN [PREFERRED, STANDARD] AND no_exclusions THEN approve ELSE IF unresolved_requirements THEN postpone ELSE decline ``` --- ## Business Objects | Business Object | Usage | Activities | |----------------|-------|-----------| | [`Application`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Application.json) | Input/Output | All activities | | [`Policyholder`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Policyholder.json) | Input | Application collection, validation | | [`Insured`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Insured.json) | Input | Application collection, medical underwriting | | [`UnderwritingDecision`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/UnderwritingDecision.json) | Output | Underwriting decision | | [`Policy`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Policy.json) | Output | Policy issuance | | [`Agent`](../../business-objects/generated/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities/Agent.json) | Input | Application submission | --- ## Business Rules ### Validation Rules 1. **Age Eligibility:** Applicant must be between 18 and 85 years old 2. **Coverage Limits:** Requested coverage must be within product limits 3. **Medical Exam Threshold:** Medical exam required for coverage > $500,000 ### Decision Rules 1. **Automatic Approval:** Standard risk class, no medical conditions, coverage < $250,000 2. **Automatic Decline:** High-risk occupation, serious medical conditions, age > 80 3. **Manual Review:** All other cases require underwriter review --- ## Integration Points | Integration | Type | Activity | Description | |------------|------|----------|-------------| | MIB (Medical Information Bureau) | API | Medical Underwriting | Check medical history | | Prescription Database | API | Medical Underwriting | Verify medications | | MVR Service | API | Risk Assessment | Motor vehicle records | | Payment Gateway | API | Policy Issuance | Process initial premium | --- ## Process Metadata ```json { "processId": "new-business-application", "processName": "New Business Application Process", "version": "1.0.0", "context": "LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities", "processType": "end-to-end", "actors": [ {"id": "agent", "name": "Insurance Agent", "type": "human"}, {"id": "system", "name": "BAW System", "type": "system"}, {"id": "underwriter", "name": "Underwriter", "type": "human"}, {"id": "medical", "name": "Medical Services", "type": "human"} ], "estimatedDuration": "2-4 weeks", "complexity": "high", "generatedFrom": "business-blueprints/LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities-2.pdf", "generatedDate": "2026-05-06T10:00:00Z" } ```

mermaid_best_practices.practice: Use consistent node shapes for activity types
Apply color coding: green for start, pink for end, yellow for decisions
Keep diagrams readable - split complex processes into subprocesses
Use subgraphs for swimlanes to show actor responsibilities
Add notes for complex business logic or important clarifications
Link business objects in activity descriptions
Use meaningful node IDs for future BPMN conversion
